hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); f.endswith('.py') and print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': '\u26a1 COSTES: batch=3art/llamada \u00b7 Mistral=fast \u00b7 Gemini=quality \u00b7 MAX_REDACTIONS=10 \u00b7 community_notes=OFF. Revisa CLAUDE.md antes de cambiar LLM calls.'}))" 2>/dev/null || true
